race.comment: Solid edition of the Cup here where ROMANS LUCK (2) racing pattern could prove pivotal to his chances. The Lynch-trained galloper showed good tactical speed fresh when leading at HQ but was reeled in late by fitter horses. Hasn't been as effective in his last two but gets a good chance to put it all together fourth-up and if he does they won't reel him in. SAVATOFF (1) doesn't win out of turn but has been tackling tougher opposition in town. Has only run here once for a minor placing, so suspect she will handle the surface. Big threat if he brings his A-game. EAGLELOU (5) was a narrow winner two back at Balaklava and then held his form in town last time. Backs up quickly and should find this a bit easier. In the mix. ICHIBANSAN (3) is warming nicely and should be near his top now on a track he relishes. May lack the class of the first few but he knows this track so well. GHEMME (4) has been mixing his form and is one for the exotics.
